title: dactylorhiza × surensis
intro: Dactylorhiza × surensis, a hybrid orchid species, is a rare and unique plant obtained from the cross-breeding of Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza sambucina. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect wounds. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × surensis include its ability to reduce swelling and promote the healing of wounds, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in infusions or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
